---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Yu-You Liou 劉昱佑"
lang: zh-TW
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing">

  <div class="landing-name">
    <div class="landing-name-block">
      <div class="landing-en">劉昱佑</div>
      <div class="landing-divider"></div>
      <div class="landing-zh">Yu-You Liou</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-footer">
    <p class="landing-tagline">
      農業、環境與生態經濟學 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 都市、區域與交通經濟學
    </p>
    <nav class="landing-nav">
      <a href="about-zh.html">關於</a>
      <a href="research-zh.html">研究</a>
      <a href="teach-zh.html">教學</a>
      <a href="https://yyliou.github.io/yyliou/cv/cv_zh.pdf" target="_blank">履歷</a>
      <a href="mailto:d10627008@ntu.edu.tw">電郵</a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PXyiL0oAAAAJ&hl=zh-TW" target="_blank">Google 學術</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/yyliou" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </nav>
  </div>

</div>
```
